raw_title: When Software Becomes the Newsroom: Journalists and the Loss of Organizational Connections
title_en: When Software Becomes the Newsroom: Journalists and the Loss of Organizational Connections
title_zh: 当软件成为新闻编辑室：记者与组织联系的丧失
plain_summary_zh: 这篇研究探讨了当软件和自动化技术越来越多地取代传统新闻编辑室功能时，记者如何失去与组织的联系。它关注技术变革对新闻工作者工作方式和职业身份的影响。
plain_summary_en: This research examines how journalists lose organizational connections as software and automation increasingly replace traditional newsroom functions. It focuses on the impact of technological change on journalists' work practices and professional identity.
research_direction_zh: 数字新闻学中技术自动化对新闻劳动和组织结构的影响研究
research_direction_en: Research on the impact of technological automation on journalistic labor and organizational structures in digital journalism
